items.title: Passenger Is Partly Sucked Through Window on Ryanair Subsidiary Flight, Reports Say
items.summary: A 61-year-old man was being treated for friction burns after a window was damaged during a flight from Greece to Germany. The flight was operated by the Ryanair subsidiary Malta...

items.title: Fire at city hotel sparks panic on Friday evening
items.summary: The fire broke out in the chimney of the hotel kitchen, following which smoke filled the ground and first floors, according to Fire and Rescue personnel
